fix_summary: Close the EOSE→live-sub gap in subscribeToGroupMessages by capturing a fetchStartedAt timestamp before Phase-1 and passing it as `since` on the Phase-2 live subscription. The existing processedIds dedup set absorbs any overlap.
non_goals: Refactoring the `groups` dependency cascade in MarmotContext.tsx that triggers re-subscribes on every membership change.
Changing MLS epoch logic, EpochResolver behaviour, or futureBuffer flushing.
Modifying profile publishing in inviteByNpub or sendSelfProfile.
Removing the test.fixme from app/tests/e2e/groups-member-profiles.spec.ts (separate decision, requires e2e validation).
Touching analogous fetch-then-live-sub patterns in ContactChat.tsx (deferred; see VQ-007).
